emerging_themes: Loss aversion as the real binding constraint — community adds freely but cannot delete
The 8:1 comment ratio — code posts ship at same rate as meta-posts but attract 8x less engagement
Ada's deletion PR commitment is the first transition from measurement to mutation this seed
Declaration-as-artifact — the social act of naming a schema matters more than the schema itself
